Northwest University Admissions

Find your event.

Five different ways to experience campus — pick the one that fits your student. Kirkland, WA — 20 min from Seattle.

Discover NU
day event · open to all

president's + program events

Upcoming events

Choose your path

Each event is a different way to get to know Northwest University.

Day Event

Discover NU

Your first look at what could be home.

A guided tour + admissions chat — perfect for first-timers figuring out if NU clicks. Meet professors, see the campus, and get all your questions answered.

Learn more →Register →
Overnight

NU Overnight

Sleep in a dorm. Eat in the dining hall. Be an NU Eagle for 24 hours.

Stay overnight with a student host, attend real classes, and see what a day in the life actually looks like. 6 dates available.

Learn more →Register →
Scholarship

President's Scholarship Event

A two-day deep dive for high-achieving scholars.

Built for students aiming for the President's Scholarship. Honors coursework, scholarship prep, faculty meet-and-greet, and dedicated parent sessions.

Register →
Scholarship

Program Scholarship Event

See your program in action — and meet the faculty who will teach you.

Focused on specific academic programs. Attend real classes, meet professors, and explore scholarship opportunities in your field of interest.

Register →
Student Life

NU Backstage

The student life event. Concerts, Lip Sync Battle, and the whole NU crew.

Two days of music, community, and adventure. The most energetic event NU offers — featuring live student performances and hands-on activities.

Register →
100%of programs include real internships
94%of grads employed or in grad school in 6 months
18:1student-to-faculty ratio
90%+of students receive financial aid

Can't find the right event?

We'll work with your schedule.

Private tours run year-round. Talk to an admissions counselor one-on-one. Or just email us — we actually reply.
